---
title: "Welcome To My Academic Blog"
author: "Pulakesh Pradhan"
date: "2026-02-10"
image: "../../images/banner.jpg"
categories: [news, education]
---

# Welcome to the Spatial Geography Hub

Welcome to my updated personal website and blog! I am thrilled to share my journey as a geographer and spatial data scientist with a global community of researchers and developers. 

This blog will serve as a space for:
- **Courses**: Deep dives into Google Earth Engine, Python, and R for geospatial analysis.
- **Project Updates**: Behind-the-scenes looks at the development of my innovations like `geeadvance` and `deepgee`.
- **Field Notes**: Insights from workshops, research conventions, and academic fieldwork.

Since this is a platform for geographers, expect to see a lot of satellite imagery, code snippets, and spatial insights. Whether you are a student just starting with GIS or a professional looking for advanced AI-driven spatial tools, I hope you find this content valuable.

Feel free to leave comments using your GitHub account—I look forward to engaging in technical discussions and collaborations!

![](https://placehold.co/1200x600/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Spatial+Analysis+with+Python)
